description: Fix contributor workflow friction: stale .tsbuildinfo causing test:e2e failures after clean, and inaccurate CONTRIBUTING.md command description

userStories.title: Fix stale .tsbuildinfo causing test:e2e plugin build failure after clean:all
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want `npm run test:e2e` to succeed after `npm run clean:all` so that the clean + rebuild cycle works reliably
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/clean.ts in --all mode removes plugins/*/*.tsbuildinfo files alongside plugins/*/dist and plugins/*/node_modules
The test:e2e script in package.json removes plugins/e2e-test/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo before running tsc, ensuring a stale .tsbuildinfo never causes tsc --build to skip emitting dist/
After running `npm run clean:all && npm install && npm run build && npm run test:e2e`, the e2e-test plugin builds successfully and E2E tests run
userStories.notes:
Two changes needed:

1. scripts/clean.ts (~line 92-103): In the --all block that handles plugins, add removal of *.tsbuildinfo files alongside dist/ and node_modules/. Currently it does:
```
remove(join(pluginsDir, plugin.name, 'node_modules'));
remove(join(pluginsDir, plugin.name, 'dist'));
```
Add a loop similar to platform packages (lines 47-56) that finds and removes *.tsbuildinfo files in each plugin directory.

2. package.json line 31: The test:e2e script is:
```
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm ci && OPENTABS_CONFIG_DIR=/tmp/opentabs-e2e-prebuild npm run build && cd ../.. && npx playwright test
```
Add `rm -f tsconfig.tsbuildinfo` after `npm ci` and before `npm run build` to handle the case where .tsbuildinfo exists but dist/ does not:
```
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm ci && rm -f tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && OPENTABS_CONFIG_DIR=/tmp/opentabs-e2e-prebuild npm run build && cd ../.. && npx playwright test
```

The root cause: tsc --build with composite projects uses .tsbuildinfo to determine if recompilation is needed. When .tsbuildinfo says 'up to date' but dist/ is missing (deleted by clean:all or never present), tsc emits nothing. The opentabs-plugin build command then fails with 'tsc succeeded but dist/index.js was not created.'

userStories.title: Fix CONTRIBUTING.md 'check' command description to say format:check instead of format
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want the CONTRIBUTING.md command reference to accurately describe what `npm run check` does so that I know it only checks formatting (not auto-fixes it)
acceptanceCriteria: CONTRIBUTING.md line 92 says 'build + lint + format:check + knip + unit tests' (was 'build + lint + format + knip + unit tests')
CONTRIBUTING.md line 108 command reference table for `npm run check` says 'All root checks (build + lint + format:check + knip + unit tests)' (was 'format')
userStories.notes:
Two occurrences in CONTRIBUTING.md to fix:

1. Line 92: `npm run check       # build + lint + format + knip + unit tests` → change 'format' to 'format:check'
2. Line 108: `| \`npm run check\`            | All root checks (build + lint + format + knip + unit tests)     |` → change 'format' to 'format:check'

The actual script in package.json line 28 runs `format:check` (not `format`). The distinction matters because `format` would auto-fix formatting, while `format:check` only reports violations. A contributor reading 'format' might incorrectly believe the check command modifies files.
